mod_datos.title: Data loading and validation
mod_datos.file_hint: CSV · TSV · TXT · XLSX · XLS · SAV · POR · DTA · SAS7BDAT · XPT · RDS

mod_diseno.title: Survey design
mod_diseno.subtitle: Define the structure of complex sampling

srs.title: Simple Random Sampling (SRS)
srs.desc: Each population unit has the same probability of being selected.
srs.yi_desc: \(y_i\): observed value of the variable for unit \(i\).
srs.S2_desc: \(S^2\): population variance of the variable of interest.

stratified.title: Stratified Sampling
stratified.desc: The population is divided into homogeneous subgroups called strata.

cluster.title: Cluster / Multi-stage Sampling
cluster.desc: Units are selected in groups called clusters or PSUs.

mod_variables.title: Variable creation
mod_variables.subtitle: Create and transform variables on the active survey design
mod_variables.no_design: You must first build the survey design in the 'Configure design' tab.
mod_variables.recode_hint: Edit the 'New value' column directly in the table (max. 50 categories):
mod_variables.expert_hint: One variable per line, using <- assignment:
mod_variables.no_vars: No derived variables yet. Use the form to create one.
mod_variables.err_no_name: You must specify a variable name.
mod_variables.err_invalid_name: The name contains invalid characters (use letters, numbers, dots or underscores).
mod_variables.err_exists: A variable with that name already exists in the design.
mod_variables.err_no_assignments: No valid assignments found. Use the form: name <- expression
mod_variables.success_add: Variable successfully added to the design.

mod_estimacion.title: Estimation
mod_estimacion.subtitle: Calculates statistics with complex sample design correction
mod_estimacion.not_run: Estimation has not yet been run.
mod_estimacion.select_theory: Select an estimator to view its theoretical framework.

mod_tablas.title: Estimation tables
mod_tablas.subtitle: Collection of results generated in the session
mod_tablas.no_tables_hint: Run an estimation in the previous tab to see results here.

mod_inferencia.title: Statistical inference
mod_inferencia.subtitle: Hypothesis testing and inequality indicators under complex sampling design
mod_inferencia.not_run: The analysis has not been run yet.
mod_inferencia.err_same_var: Variables X and Y must be different.
mod_inferencia.ctr_matrix_hint: Edit the coefficients in the table on the right panel.
mod_inferencia.ctr_sum_hint: Tip: coefficients should sum to 0 for mean comparisons.
mod_inferencia.err_no_contrasts: Define at least one contrast in the table before running.
mod_inferencia.err_coef_expr: is not a valid numeric expression (use decimals or expressions like 1/3, -2/3).

cover.desc: Statistical analysis of complex survey data. Define survey designs, estimate indicators with design-based corrections, and visualize results with uncertainty measures — no coding required.

feat1.title: Data loading
feat1.desc: Import CSV, TSV, XLSX, XLS, SAV, DTA, SAS7BDAT and RDS files. Get started immediately with the built-in example dataset.

feat2.title: Survey design
feat2.desc: Configure SRS, stratified, and multi-stage designs with expansion weights and finite population correction.

feat3.title: Estimation
feat3.desc: Compute means, totals, proportions, and quantiles by domain, with CI, standard error, and coefficient of variation.
